meta.title: OlonJS — The Contract Layer for the Agentic Web
meta.description: A deterministic machine contract for websites: typed, schema-driven content endpoints that make any site reliably readable and operable by AI agents.

data.title: The Contract Layer for the
data.description: Agents are becoming operational actors in commerce, marketing, and support. OlonJS introduces a deterministic machine contract for websites — so agents can reliably read and operate any site, without custom glue.

data.label: The challenge

problemItems.text: Agentic workflows are growing, but integration is mostly custom glue — rebuilt tenant by tenant
Every site has a different content structure, routing assumptions, and edge cases
HTML-heavy, CMS-fragmented, inconsistent across properties — slow, brittle, expensive

data.solutionTitle: A standard machine contract across tenants

solutionItems.text: Typed, schema-driven content contracts — validated, versioned, auditable
Repeatable governance and deployment patterns across every tenant

data.label: Architecture
data.sectionLead: Every layer is designed for determinism — from file system layout to component contracts to Studio UX.

cards.title: Modular Type Registry
cards.description: Core defines empty registries; tenants inject types via module augmentation. Full TypeScript safety, zero Core changes.

cards.title: Tenant Block Protocol
cards.description: Self-contained capsules (View + schema + types) enable automated ingestion and consistent editor generation.

cards.title: Deterministic CLI
cards.description: @olonjs/cli projects new tenants from a canonical script — reproducible across every environment.

cards.title: ICE Data Contract
cards.description: Mandatory DOM attributes bind the Studio canvas to Inspector fields without coupling to tenant DOM structure.

cards.title: Base Schema Fragments
cards.description: Shared BaseSectionData and BaseArrayItem enforce anchor IDs and stable React keys across all capsules.

cards.title: Path-Based Selection
cards.description: v1.4 strict path semantics eliminate nested array ambiguity. Studio selection is root-to-leaf, always deterministic.

cards.title: Agentic commerce is live
cards.description: Operational standards are missing. Without a contract layer, teams face high integration cost and low reliability.

cards.title: Enterprises need governance
cards.description: A contract layer you can audit, version, and scale — not a one-off adapter for every new agent workflow.

cards.title: AI tooling is ready
cards.description: Deterministic structure means AI can scaffold, validate, and evolve tenants with less prompt ambiguity.

cards.title: Speed compounds
cards.description: Teams that standardize now ship new experiences in hours while others rebuild integration logic repeatedly.

data.label: Developer Velocity
data.title:
AI-native advantage,
from day one
data.description: OlonJS dramatically increases AI-assisted development speed. Because structure is deterministic, agents scaffold and evolve tenants faster — with lower regression risk.

features.text: AI scaffolds and evolves tenants faster because structure is deterministic
Shared conventions reduce prompt ambiguity and implementation drift
Ship new tenant experiences in hours, not weeks

data.title:
Ready to give your site
a machine contract?
data.description: Read the full specification or explore the source on GitHub. Zero dependencies to start — one JSON endpoint per page.
